=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (8:15-8:21) TS377098: This Schema number API accepts `NaN`, `Infinity`, and `-Infinity`. Use `Schema.Finite` for finite domain numbers. If non-finite values are intentional, disable this diagnostic for that line. effect(schemaNumber)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.Finite"

  Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.FiniteFromString"

  Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.Finite"

  Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file"

[D6] (21:11-21:27) TS377098: This Schema number API accepts `NaN`, `Infinity`, and `-Infinity`. Use `Schema.FiniteFromString` for finite domain numbers. If non-finite values are intentional, disable this diagnostic for that line. effect(schemaNumber)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.Finite" ===

--- file:///.src/schemaNumber.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics schemaNumber:warning

import { Schema } from "effect"
import * as SchemaModule from "effect/Schema"
import { Number as NumberSchema, NumberFromString } from "effect/Schema"

export const user = Schema.Struct({
  age: Schema.Finite,
  score: Schema.NumberFromString,
  height: Schema.Finite,
  weight: Schema.FiniteFromString
})

export const product = SchemaModule.Struct({
  price: SchemaModule.Number,
  stock: SchemaModule.NumberFromString
})

export const direct = Schema.Struct({
  quantity: NumberSchema,
  amount: NumberFromString
})

// @effect-diagnostics-next-line schemaNumber:off
export const intentionallyNonFinite = Schema.Number


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.FiniteFromString" ===

--- file:///.src/schemaNumber.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics schemaNumber:warning

import { Schema } from "effect"
import * as SchemaModule from "effect/Schema"
import { Number as NumberSchema, NumberFromString } from "effect/Schema"

export const user = Schema.Struct({
  age: Schema.Number,
  score: Schema.FiniteFromString,
  height: Schema.Finite,
  weight: Schema.FiniteFromString
})

export const product = SchemaModule.Struct({
  price: SchemaModule.Number,
  stock: SchemaModule.NumberFromString
})

export const direct = Schema.Struct({
  quantity: NumberSchema,
  amount: NumberFromString
})

// @effect-diagnostics-next-line schemaNumber:off
export const intentionallyNonFinite = Schema.Number


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.Finite" ===

--- file:///.src/schemaNumber.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics schemaNumber:warning

import { Schema } from "effect"
import * as SchemaModule from "effect/Schema"
import { Number as NumberSchema, NumberFromString } from "effect/Schema"

export const user = Schema.Struct({
  age: Schema.Number,
  score: Schema.NumberFromString,
  height: Schema.Finite,
  weight: Schema.FiniteFromString
})

export const product = SchemaModule.Struct({
  price: SchemaModule.Finite,
  stock: SchemaModule.NumberFromString
})

export const direct = Schema.Struct({
  quantity: NumberSchema,
  amount: NumberFromString
})

// @effect-diagnostics-next-line schemaNumber:off
export const intentionallyNonFinite = Schema.Number


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Replace with Schema.FiniteFromString" ===

--- file:///.src/schemaNumber.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics schemaNumber:warning

import { Schema } from "effect"
import * as SchemaModule from "effect/Schema"
import { Number as NumberSchema, NumberFromString } from "effect/Schema"

export const user = Schema.Struct({
  age: Schema.Number,
  score: Schema.NumberFromString,
  height: Schema.Finite,
  weight: Schema.FiniteFromString
})

export const product = SchemaModule.Struct({
  price: SchemaModule.Number,
  stock: SchemaModule.FiniteFromString
})

export const direct = Schema.Struct({
  quantity: NumberSchema,
  amount: NumberFromString
})

// @effect-diagnostics-next-line schemaNumber:off
export const intentionallyNonFinite = Schema.Number


=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable schemaNumber for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable schemaNumber for entire file" ===
skipped by default
